instruction: Building a house step by step (step 6 of 6). So far you've drawn: ground, walls, roof, door, window. Add the next part: rect (x=84, y=28, width=10, height=22, fill #603020) with id "chimney".
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <line id="ground" stroke="#222" stroke-width="2" x1="8" y1="116" x2="120" y2="116" />
  <rect id="walls" fill="#e3c084" x="28" y="56" width="72" height="56" />
  <polygon id="roof" fill="#8c3b2c" points="20,56 64,16 108,56" />
  <rect id="door" fill="#6a3819" x="56" y="80" width="16" height="32" />
  <rect id="window" fill="#94c8ff" x="36" y="68" width="16" height="16" />
</svg>
